title: sida oligophylla
intro: Sida oligophylla, also known as the prickly sida or small-leaf sida, is a plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family and is native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Sida oligophylla include treating skin conditions, such as acne, eczema, and wounds, as well as reducing fever and alleviating pain. Herbal preparations of Sida oligophylla include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
